name: Almond Deviled Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the hard-boiled eggs in half lengthwise and remove the yolks, setting the whites aside.
2. In a small bowl, mash the egg yolks with mayonnaise, Dijon mustard, garlic salt, and finely chopped roasted almonds until well combined.
3. Evenly fill the egg whites with the yolk mixture.
4. Garnish each serving with whole roasted almonds and fresh parsley.
5. Chill the deviled eggs until ready to serve.
Yield: 12 servings
